shots.prompt: dead cinematic render facility, abandoned, cold industrial projection light, dust in projector beam, 35mm film look, high contrast
solitary projectionist wakes on the floor of a ruined render room, flickering monitors, exhausted face, shallow depth of field
terminal screen displays EXPORT FAILED, reflected in the projectionist eye, tense macro shot, minimal motion
projectionist alone before dead render servers and silent projector, empty facility, no audience, cold light
wall of corrupted film frames floating like broken memories, analog scratches, digital decay, slow lateral camera movement
projectionist hand selects a damaged frame from a glowing timeline, tactile sacred precise movement, choosing evidence
recovered film frame reveals an empty cinema chair under a single projector beam, emotionally devastating stillness
projectionist realizes the missing image is himself as witness, face lit by corrupted timeline, grief and acceptance
projectionist walks into projector beam, white light swallowing the edges of his body, solemn final witness
render terminal progress bar reaches 100 percent, text reads FINAL RENDER COMPLETE, cold white glow
facility lights shut down one by one, projector keeps running alone, empty room, dust in beam
black screen after final render, only projector sound remains, terminal silence, finality
